Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Certificates Of Merit, Permit Service On Doe Defendants, Permit Plaintiff To File An Amended Complaint, And Permit Plaintiff To Proceed Under A Fictitious Name; Memorandum Of Points And Authorties In Support Thereof.
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RYAN D. HARVEY, Esq. of Herman Law (Tel: 305-931-2200) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF M. C.'s Motion To Seal Certificates Of Merit, Permit Service On Doe Defendants, Permit Plaintiff To File An Amended Complaint, And Permit Plaintiff To Proceed Under A Fictitious Name.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

"Plaintiff's motion to seal certificates of merit, permit service on Doe defendants, permit plaintiff to file an amended complaint, and permit plaintiff to proceed under a fictitious name" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
